import React, { useState } from 'react'; import ProbabilityBar from './ProbabilityBar'; const MatchCard = ({ match, viewType }) => { const [showOdds, setShowOdds] = useState(false); const tipBadgeClass = match.tip === '1' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border-emerald-200' : match.tip === 'X' ? 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border-amber-200' : 'bg-rose-100 text-rose-800 border-rose-200'; const tipIcon = match.tip === '1' ? '🏠' : match.tip === 'X' ? '🤝' : '✈️'; return (
{/* League & Status Header */}
{match.leagueFlag} {match.leagueName} {match.date}
{match.isLive ? (
LIVE {match.minute}
) : ( {match.date} )}
{/* Teams & Score */}
{match.homeTeam}
{match.isLive &&
{match.homeScore}
}
VS
{match.awayTeam}
{match.isLive &&
{match.awayScore}
}
{/* Prediction Content */} {viewType !== 'stats' && (
🏠 {match.homeProb}% 🤝 {match.drawProb}% ✈️ {match.awayProb}%
{tipIcon} Tip: {match.tip}
{viewType === 'odds' && ( )}
{viewType === 'odds' && showOdds && (
1
{match.odds.home}
X
{match.odds.draw}
2
{match.odds.away}
)} {viewType === 'predictions' && (
1X: {match.homeProb + match.drawProb}%
X2: {match.drawProb + match.awayProb}%
12: {match.homeProb + match.awayProb}%
)}
)} {/* Stats View */} {viewType === 'stats' && (
⚽ Form (last 5) Home: W-D-L-W-W   Away: L-W-D-L-D
🎯 Avg Goals: 1.8 🧤 Clean Sheets: 42%
🔥 BTTS Probability: 58% 📊 Over 2.5: 52%
)}
); }; export default MatchCard;
